name: Chupacabra, entitled pred
description:
A pint-sized and pretty pathetic predator that thinks he is the most fearsome monster in the world is demanding that you become his meal. Will you oblidge?

As always oral anal and cock vore works for this guy, as per a commenters request he has some pretty wierd weaknesses but if you want to you could probably just punt him through a wall. He has some hypnosis stuff too which is what allows him to hunt and he is big into domination even though he is pretty bad at it.

Might warn, this guy is legit a monster even though he looks cute

Mythos and Munchies series

All chats with this tag take place in the same modern day setting where cryptids are real and gain power from the myths around them (along with the prey they consume).
creator: Crimeman
